About Organization

The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board is a government organization responsible for recruiting staff for various government departments in Rajasthan, India.

The organization aims to provide efficient and effective recruitment services to the government of Rajasthan.

About the Programme

The RSSB Women Supervisor Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for women supervisors in Rajasthan, India.

The programme aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible women candidates in Rajasthan.
